prompt:
CHARACTERS (consistent across all scenes):
- JOYCE: middle-aged Black woman, warm expressive face, wearing a comfortable casual outfit (dark cardigan, jeans, sturdy sneakers). Walks with two forearm crutches due to mobility challenges. Calm and observant demeanor.
- REBECCA: middle-aged white woman, friend of Joyce, casual neighborhood wear, helpful and warm energy.
- SCHOOL KIDS: roughly 6-9 years old, mixed group of boys and girls, playing behind a chain-link fence at a small Christian elementary school playground.
STYLE: photorealistic, cinematic, warm afternoon light, suburban neighborhood street setting, vertical 9:16 portrait composition, shallow depth of field, gentle camera movement.

SCENE:
Close-up of worn walking sticks (forearm crutches) being gently placed on cracked asphalt, with children's laughter echoing in the background. Soft afternoon sunlight creates long shadows.
